abilities.name: Extra Smoke
abilities.text: As long as Kingdra ex is in play, any damage done to your Stage 2 Pokemon-ex by an opponent's attack is reduced by 10.

attacks.name: Aqua Flame
attacks.text: You may discard 2 basic Energy cards attached to Kingdra ex. If you do, this attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokemon.

attacks.name: Dragon Pump
attacks.text: You may discard 2 basic Energy cards attached to Kingdra ex. If you do, this attack does 40 damage plus 30 more damage.

tests.name: extra_smoke_reduces_damage
tests.description: Test Extra Smoke reduces damage to Stage 2 ex

tests.name: dragon_pump_boost
tests.description: Test Dragon Pump does +30 when discarding energy
